{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Nezarin
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Nezarin]] is a standard blue-green planet with a mid-sized yellow sun.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
